summary: AI Image Service testing complete. All 21 backend tests and frontend UI tests passed. AI-generated images using gpt-image-1 are correctly: generated lazily, stored as WebP, served via static route, included in API responses with image_source='ai', and displayed in frontend hero and recipe cards.
critical_code_review_comments: AI image service well-implemented with proper concurrency lock (_gen_locks) preventing duplicate generation
WebP format correctly used for efficient storage (images 100-234KB)
Translation API correctly includes image_url, image_alt, image_source in metadata
No API keys exposed in responses - verified via test
Frontend RecipePage.jsx correctly uses data-testid='recipe-hero-image' for hero section
RecipeCard.jsx correctly falls back to ChefHat placeholder when no image
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing AI-generated images
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI image generation via OpenAI gpt-image-1 is working. Known recipes WITH AI images: pizza-margherita-italy, risotto-alla-milanese-italy, coq-au-vin-france, spaghetti-alla-carbonara-italy. Images stored in /app/backend/static/recipe-images/ as WebP. Recipes WITHOUT images (tacos-al-pastor-mexico, tonkotsu-ramen-japan, mole-poblano-mexico) will auto-generate on first view but this is SLOW (30-60s) and EXPENSIVE. Image generation triggered via auto_assign_ai_image() in /api/recipes/{slug} endpoint.

backend_api_tests.TestAIImageRecipeAPI: 6/6 passed - recipe returns image_url, image_alt, image_source='ai'
backend_api_tests.TestStaticImageServing: 6/6 passed - static files return 200 with content-type image/webp
backend_api_tests.TestGracefulFallback: 2/2 passed - recipes without images load correctly
backend_api_tests.TestImageCaching: 1/1 passed - second request returns same cached image
backend_api_tests.TestTranslationAPIIncludesImage: 3/3 passed - translation API includes image data in metadata
backend_api_tests.TestAPIKeySecurity: 3/3 passed - no API keys exposed in responses

frontend_ui_tests.RecipePage_HeroImage: PASSED - Hero image renders with data-testid='recipe-hero-image' for AI-imaged recipes
frontend_ui_tests.RecipePage_NoImage: PASSED - Pages without images load gracefully (no hero section, no crash)
frontend_ui_tests.ExplorePage_RecipeCards: PASSED - Cards show AI images where available, placeholder otherwise
